turns.speaker: Customer
turns.text: I want to know why my account was suspended. I haven't done anything wrong.

turns.speaker: Marcus
turns.text: Okay so I need to look at your account. What's your email?

turns.speaker: Marcus
turns.text: Right, I can see here your account was flagged by our fraud team. It looks like there were some unusual login patterns.

turns.speaker: Customer
turns.text: That's ridiculous. I want it unsuspended now.

turns.speaker: Marcus
turns.text: I get that you're annoyed but there's not much I can do. The fraud team makes that call, not me. You'd have to wait for them to review it which could be weeks.

turns.speaker: Customer
turns.text: Weeks?! That's unacceptable. I have money in there.

turns.speaker: Marcus
turns.text: Yeah I understand but I can't override the fraud team. That's just how it works. I can log a note if you want.

turns.speaker: Customer
turns.text: This is terrible service. I'm going to report you.

turns.speaker: Marcus
turns.text: That's your right. Is there anything else?

escalation_signals.text: Weeks?! That's unacceptable. I have money in there.
This is terrible service. I'm going to report you.
This is terrible service. I'm going to report you.
